CONTENT.Club career: On 1 January 2023, Simoni signed for Bundesliga club Eintracht Frankfurt on a four-and-a-half-year contract.On 5 July 2024, Simoni moved on loan to 3. Liga club FC Ingolstadt 04.
CONTENT.International career: Simoni represented Albania in their youth national teams, including U17, U18, U19, U20 and U21. On 27 May 2024, he was included in the Albanian senior team's 27-man preliminary squad for the UEFA Euro 2024. On 8 June, he was excluded from the final squad prior to the tournament.

SUMMARY: Simon Simoni (born 14 July 2004) is an Albanian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for German 3. Liga club FC Ingolstadt 04 on loan from Eintracht Frankfurt.
